name: com.nksvilya.vartronic2011
description: Homey Pro local app for VARMANN Vartronic convectors over Modbus TCP.

scripts.homey:validate: npm run build && homey app validate
scripts.homey:validate:publish: npm run build && homey app validate --level=publish
scripts.homey:run: npm run build && homey app run
scripts.homey:install: npm run build && homey app install
